title: Vanilla+ Optimized
description: A modpack that aims to optimize and add client-side features to improve gameplay overhall.
body:
A minecraft modpack that aims to improve gameplay by **improving performace** and **adding vanilla + client-side features** to the game.
### THIS MODPACK IS UNDERDEVELOPMENT, IF THERE IS ANY BUG, REPORT IT ON THE [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/szhhsr8Txt)
I will eventually update the mod as soon as possible.
### I recommend to mess around with the settings, especially the graphics settings and keybinds (a lot of them have conflicts with other keybinds)
